trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The enforcer has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the enforcer's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

trait.name: Shadow Step
entries: In dim light or darkness, the enforcer can teleport up to 30 feet as a bonus action.

trait.name: Relentless Endurance (1/Day)
entries: When the enforcer is reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, they drop to 1 hit point instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The enforcer makes two melee attacks.

action.name: Shadow Dagger
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) necrotic damage.

action.name: Brutal Strike (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The enforcer makes a melee weapon attack. On a hit, the target must succeed on a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of the enforcer's next turn.

reaction.name: Defensive Reflex
entries: When a creature within 5 feet of the enforcer makes an attack roll, the enforcer can impose disadvantage on the roll.
